settings.subheading: Rare diamonds, vintage icons, and original designs — each piece selected for women who know exactly what they want.

settings.title: Shop by Designer
settings.description: From Cartier to Van Cleef & Arpels — explore pre-owned and estate pieces from the most coveted names in jewelry. Each piece is individually authenticated and curated for lasting beauty.
settings.partner_note: All estate and antique pieces are pre-owned, hand-selected, and individually authenticated.

settings.title:
Fine Jewelry,
Authentically Sourced
settings.body: Laura Milman New York was founded on the belief that the most beautiful jewelry carries a story worth telling. From original fine jewelry crafted with traceable diamonds to hand-selected antique pieces from the world's great houses — every item in our collection is chosen with purpose. We offer a wide selection spanning classic and timeless designs to rare vintage finds, ensuring there is something extraordinary for every chapter of your life. Based in New York, we believe in complete transparency: we trace every diamond we carry to its source, and every estate piece is individually authenticated before it reaches you.

settings.quote: I am absolutely in love with my necklace from Laura Milman. The quality is exceptional — it looks even more beautiful in person than in the photos. It's become my signature piece and I get compliments every time I wear it.
settings.author: Sarah L.

settings.quote: I searched for months for the perfect engagement ring and found it here. The selection is extraordinary and the team was so helpful. My fiancée cried the moment she saw it — exactly what I was hoping for.
settings.author: Michael P.

settings.quote: I was hesitant to buy estate jewelry online, but Laura Milman made it completely effortless. The piece arrived beautifully packaged, exactly as described, and their authenticity guarantee gave me total confidence.
settings.author: Alex T.
